Hello Toni! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a pleasur…

Hello Toni,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I’m extremely sorry as I was unavailable for the last couple of days.   I already did highlight your request to the website team, and they did update the meta tags as well and they…
Please let me know your availability for a call. I really love to speak to you before we proceed.

Nonetheless Zoca shows up as #6 when i search Body Genie Esthetics.  1 is google  2 is Vagaro  3 is mapquest 4 is IG 5 is Patch  Then comes Zoca  PS why did it take this email for you to respond to say she has been out o…
Thanks for the response however, the zoca page is in fact still not updated as requested.

Hi Toni,  We received your concern regarding the cancellation and the issues with the Google page updates. I sincerely apologize for the lack of communication you’ve experienced over the last week. Monisha is out of the …

Hi Toni, I am writing this personally to offer my sincerest apologies for the frustration this has caused. I have reviewed the screenshot you sent, and I completely understand why seeing Zoca at #6 is disappointing. I wa…

Subject: Re: Recap of Our Meeting & Next Steps for Your Zoca Account\n\nBody: Dear Toni, I have taken over management of your account and have reviewed the entire conversation following your handover with Monisha. We und…
You’re welcome :)
Thank you Monisha
Why does my search not show anything about waxing or spray tanning? Those are my 2 most popular services. Is there a reason it is not listed on a google search on Zoca preview page?
Hello Toni,  Hope you’re doing well!  Let me check on this and get back to you
Can you posts photos with my google updates like i have in the previous posts when i was managing it?
Got it. Will get this updated!
Thanks
Can you post photos with my Google
Photos don’t add any value to Google posts, it’s just for beatification.   ￼However, you may add the same through the “Google posts” option in the zoca app
Thank you! We’ve received the payment!
So, i take that as a no, Zoca cannot take on the task?
This is a feature that my team is currently working on but right now this a request we cannot cater to
You’re welcome
Good evening.  I just paid the invoice!
I want it to be listed on the home page as well!

Hello Toni,  Hope you’re doing well :)  We noticed that the payment has not been done yet.   Sharing a new link, please let me know once it’s done!   https://zoca.chargebee.com/pages/v3/RtN9o2BjgBO3gX55UlcdETjcujqjOUNyl8…
Also, we got a request from your end to add teeth whitening on the website. We saw that it’s already added. Are there any other changes that you need?
Hello Toni,  Hope you’re doing well :)   Please find the payment link - https://zoca.chargebee.com/pages/v3/vHYSfNDKFd3B6S3pslahrjzSe7cdLPi2cu/collect_now
Sure, Toni! Happy thanksgiving! Enjoy you holiday :)
Good morning and thank you.  I will set this up on Monday when i back in my office.  Today is our Holiday,  Thanksgiving.

Subject: Re: Recap of Our Meeting & Next Steps for Your Zoca Account\n\nBody: Thank you! Toni Marie Body Genie Esthetics 203.727.2795 On Tue, Nov 25, 2025, 2:44 PM Monisha Arunkumar < monisha.a@zoca.com > wrote: Hi Toni,…
Hello Toni,  It was lovely speaking with you!   As discussed over our meeting, I’ll be your main point of contact going forward.   Speak to the team and get the website published for you.
Hello Toni,  It was lovely speaking with you!   As discussed over our meeting, I’ll be your main point of contact going forward.   Speak to the team and get the website published for you.
Please feel free to text me here if you need any assistance. I’ll share you an email with the payment link shortly.
